title: RBI (Commercial Banks — Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Sixth Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI updated the 2025 Capital Adequacy Directions after issuing revised rules on classification, valuation, and operation of investment portfolios. The amendment specifically deletes sub-paragraph 21(i)(b).
The post RBI (Commercial Banks — Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Sixth Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
